DBStatement.name: Statement
DBStatement.sql:
select t1.purchase_id, t1.year_str, t1.fuel_type, t1.receipt_payment_type, t1.issue_id, t1.item_first_payment_date, t1.item_first_accounting_price, t1.item_first_accounting_tax_price, t1.item_first_payment_price, t1.item_first_payment_tax_price, t2.item_last_payment_date, t2.item_last_accounting_price, t2.item_last_accounting_tax_price, t2.item_last_payment_price, t2.item_last_payment_tax_price, t3.fare_first_payment_date, t3.fare_first_accounting_price, t3.fare_first_accounting_tax_price, t3.fare_first_payment_price, t3.fare_first_payment_tax_price, t4.fare_last_payment_date, t4.fare_last_accounting_price, t4.fare_last_accounting_tax_price, t4.fare_last_payment_price, t4.fare_last_payment_tax_price, "S00000000"."燃種別データ_ガス"."受入比率" as acceptance_ratio, "S00000000"."燃種別データ_ガス"."プロパン・ブタン区分" as propane_butane_type, "S00000000"."燃種別データ_ガス"."熱量_btu" as calorie_quantity_btu, "S00000000"."燃種別データ_ガス"."重量" as weight_quantity, "S00000000"."燃種別データ_ガス"."総発熱量" as total_calorie_quantity, "S00000000"."燃種別データ_ガス"."受入総重量" as total_weight_quantity, "S00000000"."燃種別データ_ガス"."受入総熱量" as acceptance_total_calorie_quantity, "S00000000"."燃種別データ_ガス"."lnpg密度" as lnpg_density_quantity, "S00000000"."燃種別データ_ガス"."受入容積" as acceptance_quantity, "S00000000"."燃種別データ_ガス"."取引容量_試運転" as contact_quantity_try, "S00000000"."燃種別データ_ガス"."取引容量_営業運転" as contact_quantity_sales, "S00000000"."燃種別データ_ガス"."着桟年月日" as landing_date, "S00000000"."燃種別データ_ガス"."メタン" as methane_quantity, "S00000000"."燃種別データ_ガス"."エタン" as ethane_quantity, "S00000000"."燃種別データ_ガス"."プロパン" as propane_quantity, "S00000000"."燃種別データ_ガス"."イソブタン" as isobutane_quantity, "S00000000"."燃種別データ_ガス"."ノルマルブタン" as normal_butane_quantity, "S00000000"."燃種別データ_ガス"."イソペンタン" as isopentane_quantity, "S00000000"."燃種別データ_ガス"."硫黄" as sulfur_quantity, "S00000000"."燃種別データ_ガス"."硫化水素" as hydrogen_sulfide, "S00000000"."燃種別データ_ガス"."水分" as moisture_quantity, "S00000000"."燃種別データ_ガス"."窒素" as nitrogen_quantity, "S00000000"."燃種別データ_ガス"."酸素" as oxigen_quantity, "S00000000"."燃種別データ_ガス"."二酸化炭素" as carbon_dioxide_quantity, "S00000000"."燃種別データ_ガス"."プロジェクト" as project_type, t1.inventory_type, t1.shop_type, t1.cargo_bl, t1.delivery_condition_type, t1.ship_name, t1.loading_area_name, t1.brand_name, t1.remarks, t1.finish_date, t1.lift_plan_date, t1.lift_date, t1.accounting_ym, t1.customs_clearance_date, t1.customs_clearance_type
from (select d1."購入受入id" as purchase_id, d1."年度" as year_str, d1."燃種" as fuel_type, d1."受払種別" as receipt_payment_type, d1."発行番号" as issue_id, d1.inventory_type, d1.shop_type, d1.cargo_bl, d1.delivery_condition_type, d1.ship_name, d1.loading_area_name, d1.brand_name, d1.remarks, d1.finish_date, d1.lift_plan_date, d1.lift_date, d1.customs_clearance_date, d1.customs_clearance_type, d1.accounting_ym, min("S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."支払年月日") as item_first_payment_date, sum("S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."計上金額") as item_first_accounting_price, sum("S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."計上消費税額") as item_first_accounting_tax_price, sum("S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."支払金額") as item_first_payment_price, sum("S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."支払消費税額") as item_first_payment_tax_price from "S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額" inner join
(select "S00000000"."購入受入"."購入受入id", "S00000000"."購入受入"."在庫区分" as inventory_type, "S00000000"."購入受入"."年度", "S00000000"."購入受入"."燃種", "S00000000"."購入受入"."受払種別", "S00000000"."購入受入"."発行番号", "S00000000"."購入受入"."店所"as shop_type, "S00000000"."購入受入"."カーゴ_bl" as cargo_bl, "S00000000"."購入受入"."受渡条件" as delivery_condition_type, "S00000000"."購入受入"."輸送船名"as ship_name, "S00000000"."購入受入"."積地"as loading_area_name, "S00000000"."購入受入"."銘柄"as brand_name, "S00000000"."購入受入"."備考" as remarks, "S00000000"."購入受入"."積完了年月日"as finish_date, "S00000000"."購入受入"."揚荷予定完了年月日" as lift_plan_date, "S00000000"."購入受入"."揚完了年月日"as lift_date, "S00000000"."購入受入"."通関年月日"as customs_clearance_date, "S00000000"."購入受入"."通関区分"as customs_clearance_type, "S00000000"."諸掛・品代"."諸掛・品代id", "S00000000"."諸掛・品代"."諸掛", "S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."承認日時", "S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."計上年月"as accounting_ym from "S00000000"."購入受入" inner join "S00000000"."諸掛・品代" on "S00000000"."諸掛・品代"."購入_年度" = "S00000000"."購入受入"."年度" and "S00000000"."諸掛・品代"."購入_発行番号" = "S00000000"."購入受入"."発行番号" and "S00000000"."諸掛・品代"."購入_受払種別" = "S00000000"."購入受入"."受払種別" and "S00000000"."諸掛・品代"."購入_燃種" = "S00000000"."購入受入"."燃種" inner join "S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額" on "S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."諸掛・品代id" = "S00000000"."諸掛・品代"."諸掛・品代id" where "S00000000"."購入受入"."燃種" ='2700' and "S00000000"."諸掛・品代"."諸掛" in ('000000','000001') and "S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."当初／精算区分" = '1' and to_date(cast("S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."承認日時" as TEXT), 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') between to_date(?,'YYYY-MM-DD') - INTERVAL '7 days' and to_date(?,'YYYY-MM-DD')) as d1
on d1."諸掛" = '000000' and "S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."諸掛・品代id" = d1."諸掛・品代id" group by d1."購入受入id",d1."年度", d1."燃種", d1."受払種別", d1."発行番号", d1.inventory_type, d1.shop_type, d1.cargo_bl, d1.delivery_condition_type, d1.ship_name, d1.loading_area_name, d1.brand_name, d1.remarks, d1.finish_date, d1.lift_plan_date, d1.lift_date, d1.accounting_ym, d1.customs_clearance_date, d1.customs_clearance_type
) t1
left join (select d1."購入受入id" as purchase_id, d1."年度" as year_str, d1."燃種" as fuel_type, d1."受払種別" as receipt_payment_type, d1."発行番号" as issue_id, d1.inventory_type, d1.shop_type, d1.cargo_bl, d1.delivery_condition_type, d1.ship_name, d1.loading_area_name, d1.brand_name, d1.remarks, d1.finish_date, d1.lift_plan_date, d1.lift_date, d1.customs_clearance_date, d1.customs_clearance_type, d1.accounting_ym, max("S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."支払年月日") as item_last_payment_date, sum("S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."計上金額") as item_last_accounting_price, sum("S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."計上消費税額") as item_last_accounting_tax_price, sum("S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."支払金額") as item_last_payment_price, sum("S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."支払消費税額") as item_last_payment_tax_price from "S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額" inner join
(select "S00000000"."購入受入"."購入受入id", "S00000000"."購入受入"."在庫区分" as inventory_type, "S00000000"."購入受入"."年度", "S00000000"."購入受入"."燃種", "S00000000"."購入受入"."受払種別", "S00000000"."購入受入"."発行番号", "S00000000"."購入受入"."店所"as shop_type, "S00000000"."購入受入"."カーゴ_bl" as cargo_bl, "S00000000"."購入受入"."受渡条件" as delivery_condition_type, "S00000000"."購入受入"."輸送船名"as ship_name, "S00000000"."購入受入"."積地"as loading_area_name, "S00000000"."購入受入"."銘柄"as brand_name, "S00000000"."購入受入"."備考" as remarks, "S00000000"."購入受入"."積完了年月日"as finish_date, "S00000000"."購入受入"."揚荷予定完了年月日" as lift_plan_date, "S00000000"."購入受入"."揚完了年月日"as lift_date, "S00000000"."購入受入"."通関年月日"as customs_clearance_date, "S00000000"."購入受入"."通関区分"as customs_clearance_type, "S00000000"."諸掛・品代"."諸掛・品代id", "S00000000"."諸掛・品代"."諸掛", "S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."承認日時", "S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."計上年月"as accounting_ym from "S00000000"."購入受入" inner join "S00000000"."諸掛・品代" on "S00000000"."諸掛・品代"."購入_年度" = "S00000000"."購入受入"."年度" and "S00000000"."諸掛・品代"."購入_発行番号" = "S00000000"."購入受入"."発行番号" and "S00000000"."諸掛・品代"."購入_受払種別" = "S00000000"."購入受入"."受払種別" and "S00000000"."諸掛・品代"."購入_燃種" = "S00000000"."購入受入"."燃種" inner join "S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額" on "S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."諸掛・品代id" = "S00000000"."諸掛・品代"."諸掛・品代id" where "S00000000"."購入受入"."燃種" ='2700' and "S00000000"."諸掛・品代"."諸掛" in ('000000','000001') and "S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."当初／精算区分" = '1' and to_date(cast("S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."承認日時" as TEXT), 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') between to_date(?,'YYYY-MM-DD') - INTERVAL '7 days' and to_date(?,'YYYY-MM-DD')) as d1
on d1."諸掛" = '000000' and "S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."諸掛・品代id" = d1."諸掛・品代id" group by d1."購入受入id",d1."年度", d1."燃種", d1."受払種別", d1."発行番号", d1.inventory_type, d1.shop_type, d1.cargo_bl, d1.delivery_condition_type, d1.ship_name, d1.loading_area_name, d1.brand_name, d1.remarks, d1.finish_date, d1.lift_plan_date, d1.lift_date, d1.accounting_ym, d1.customs_clearance_date, d1.customs_clearance_type
) t2 on t1.purchase_id = t2.purchase_id and t1.year_str = t2.year_str and t1.fuel_type = t2.fuel_type and t1.receipt_payment_type = t2.receipt_payment_type and t1.issue_id = t2.issue_id
left join (select d1."購入受入id" as purchase_id, d1."年度" as year_str, d1."燃種" as fuel_type, d1."受払種別" as receipt_payment_type, d1."発行番号" as issue_id, d1.inventory_type, d1.shop_type, d1.cargo_bl, d1.delivery_condition_type, d1.ship_name, d1.loading_area_name, d1.brand_name, d1.remarks, d1.finish_date, d1.lift_plan_date, d1.lift_date, d1.customs_clearance_date, d1.customs_clearance_type, d1.accounting_ym, min("S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."支払年月日") as fare_first_payment_date, sum("S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."計上金額") as fare_first_accounting_price, sum("S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."計上消費税額") as fare_first_accounting_tax_price, sum("S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."支払金額") as fare_first_payment_price, sum("S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."支払消費税額") as fare_first_payment_tax_price from "S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額" inner join
(select "S00000000"."購入受入"."購入受入id", "S00000000"."購入受入"."在庫区分" as inventory_type, "S00000000"."購入受入"."年度", "S00000000"."購入受入"."燃種", "S00000000"."購入受入"."受払種別", "S00000000"."購入受入"."発行番号", "S00000000"."購入受入"."店所"as shop_type, "S00000000"."購入受入"."カーゴ_bl" as cargo_bl, "S00000000"."購入受入"."受渡条件" as delivery_condition_type, "S00000000"."購入受入"."輸送船名"as ship_name, "S00000000"."購入受入"."積地"as loading_area_name, "S00000000"."購入受入"."銘柄"as brand_name, "S00000000"."購入受入"."備考" as remarks, "S00000000"."購入受入"."積完了年月日"as finish_date, "S00000000"."購入受入"."揚荷予定完了年月日" as lift_plan_date, "S00000000"."購入受入"."揚完了年月日"as lift_date, "S00000000"."購入受入"."通関年月日"as customs_clearance_date, "S00000000"."購入受入"."通関区分"as customs_clearance_type, "S00000000"."諸掛・品代"."諸掛・品代id", "S00000000"."諸掛・品代"."諸掛", "S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."承認日時", "S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."計上年月"as accounting_ym from "S00000000"."購入受入" inner join "S00000000"."諸掛・品代" on "S00000000"."諸掛・品代"."購入_年度" = "S00000000"."購入受入"."年度" and "S00000000"."諸掛・品代"."購入_発行番号" = "S00000000"."購入受入"."発行番号" and "S00000000"."諸掛・品代"."購入_受払種別" = "S00000000"."購入受入"."受払種別" and "S00000000"."諸掛・品代"."購入_燃種" = "S00000000"."購入受入"."燃種" inner join "S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額" on "S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."諸掛・品代id" = "S00000000"."諸掛・品代"."諸掛・品代id" where "S00000000"."購入受入"."燃種" ='2700' and "S00000000"."諸掛・品代"."諸掛" in ('000000','000001') and "S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."当初／精算区分" = '1' and to_date(cast("S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."承認日時" as TEXT), 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') between to_date(?,'YYYY-MM-DD') - INTERVAL '7 days' and to_date(?,'YYYY-MM-DD')) as d1
on d1."諸掛" = '000001' and "S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."諸掛・品代id" = d1."諸掛・品代id" group by d1."購入受入id",d1."年度", d1."燃種", d1."受払種別", d1."発行番号", d1.inventory_type, d1.shop_type, d1.cargo_bl, d1.delivery_condition_type, d1.ship_name, d1.loading_area_name, d1.brand_name, d1.remarks, d1.finish_date, d1.lift_plan_date, d1.lift_date, d1.accounting_ym, d1.customs_clearance_date, d1.customs_clearance_type
) t3 on t1.purchase_id = t3.purchase_id and t1.year_str = t3.year_str and t1.fuel_type = t3.fuel_type and t1.receipt_payment_type = t3.receipt_payment_type and t1.issue_id = t3.issue_id
left join (select d1."購入受入id" as purchase_id, d1."年度" as year_str, d1."燃種" as fuel_type, d1."受払種別" as receipt_payment_type, d1."発行番号" as issue_id, d1.inventory_type, d1.shop_type, d1.cargo_bl, d1.delivery_condition_type, d1.ship_name, d1.loading_area_name, d1.brand_name, d1.remarks, d1.finish_date, d1.lift_plan_date, d1.lift_date, d1.customs_clearance_date, d1.customs_clearance_type, d1.accounting_ym, max("S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."支払年月日") as fare_last_payment_date, sum("S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."計上金額") as fare_last_accounting_price, sum("S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."計上消費税額") as fare_last_accounting_tax_price, sum("S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."支払金額") as fare_last_payment_price, sum("S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."支払消費税額") as fare_last_payment_tax_price from "S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額" inner join
(select "S00000000"."購入受入"."購入受入id", "S00000000"."購入受入"."在庫区分" as inventory_type, "S00000000"."購入受入"."年度", "S00000000"."購入受入"."燃種", "S00000000"."購入受入"."受払種別", "S00000000"."購入受入"."発行番号", "S00000000"."購入受入"."店所"as shop_type, "S00000000"."購入受入"."カーゴ_bl" as cargo_bl, "S00000000"."購入受入"."受渡条件" as delivery_condition_type, "S00000000"."購入受入"."輸送船名"as ship_name, "S00000000"."購入受入"."積地"as loading_area_name, "S00000000"."購入受入"."銘柄"as brand_name, "S00000000"."購入受入"."備考" as remarks, "S00000000"."購入受入"."積完了年月日"as finish_date, "S00000000"."購入受入"."揚荷予定完了年月日" as lift_plan_date, "S00000000"."購入受入"."揚完了年月日"as lift_date, "S00000000"."購入受入"."通関年月日"as customs_clearance_date, "S00000000"."購入受入"."通関区分"as customs_clearance_type, "S00000000"."諸掛・品代"."諸掛・品代id", "S00000000"."諸掛・品代"."諸掛", "S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."承認日時", "S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."計上年月"as accounting_ym from "S00000000"."購入受入" inner join "S00000000"."諸掛・品代" on "S00000000"."諸掛・品代"."購入_年度" = "S00000000"."購入受入"."年度" and "S00000000"."諸掛・品代"."購入_発行番号" = "S00000000"."購入受入"."発行番号" and "S00000000"."諸掛・品代"."購入_受払種別" = "S00000000"."購入受入"."受払種別" and "S00000000"."諸掛・品代"."購入_燃種" = "S00000000"."購入受入"."燃種" inner join "S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額" on "S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."諸掛・品代id" = "S00000000"."諸掛・品代"."諸掛・品代id" where "S00000000"."購入受入"."燃種" ='2700' and "S00000000"."諸掛・品代"."諸掛" in ('000000','000001') and "S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."当初／精算区分" = '1' and to_date(cast("S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."承認日時" as TEXT), 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') between to_date(?,'YYYY-MM-DD') - INTERVAL '7 days' and to_date(?,'YYYY-MM-DD')) as d1
on d1."諸掛" = '000001' and "S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."諸掛・品代id" = d1."諸掛・品代id" group by d1."購入受入id",d1."年度", d1."燃種", d1."受払種別", d1."発行番号", d1.inventory_type, d1.shop_type, d1.cargo_bl, d1.delivery_condition_type, d1.ship_name, d1.loading_area_name, d1.brand_name, d1.remarks, d1.finish_date, d1.lift_plan_date, d1.lift_date, d1.accounting_ym, d1.customs_clearance_date, d1.customs_clearance_type
) t4 on t1.purchase_id = t4.purchase_id and t1.year_str = t4.year_str and t1.fuel_type = t4.fuel_type and t1.receipt_payment_type = t4.receipt_payment_type and t1.issue_id = t4.issue_id
inner join "S00000000"."燃種別データ_ガス" on "S00000000"."燃種別データ_ガス"."購入受入id" = t1.purchase_id
UNION
select t1.purchase_id, t1.year_str, t1.fuel_type, t1.receipt_payment_type, t1.issue_id, t1.item_first_payment_date, t1.item_first_accounting_price, t1.item_first_accounting_tax_price, t1.item_first_payment_price, t1.item_first_payment_tax_price, t2.item_last_payment_date, t2.item_last_accounting_price, t2.item_last_accounting_tax_price, t2.item_last_payment_price, t2.item_last_payment_tax_price, t3.fare_first_payment_date, t3.fare_first_accounting_price, t3.fare_first_accounting_tax_price, t3.fare_first_payment_price, t3.fare_first_payment_tax_price, t4.fare_last_payment_date, t4.fare_last_accounting_price, t4.fare_last_accounting_tax_price, t4.fare_last_payment_price, t4.fare_last_payment_tax_price, "S00000000"."燃種別データ_ガス"."受入比率" as acceptance_ratio, "S00000000"."燃種別データ_ガス"."プロパン・ブタン区分" as propane_butane_type, "S00000000"."燃種別データ_ガス"."熱量_btu" as calorie_quantity_btu, "S00000000"."燃種別データ_ガス"."重量" as weight_quantity, "S00000000"."燃種別データ_ガス"."総発熱量" as total_calorie_quantity, "S00000000"."燃種別データ_ガス"."受入総重量" as total_weight_quantity, "S00000000"."燃種別データ_ガス"."受入総熱量" as acceptance_total_calorie_quantity, "S00000000"."燃種別データ_ガス"."lnpg密度" as lnpg_density_quantity, "S00000000"."燃種別データ_ガス"."受入容積" as acceptance_quantity, "S00000000"."燃種別データ_ガス"."取引容量_試運転" as contact_quantity_try, (select "S00000000"."購入受入"."購入受入id", "S00000000"."購入受入"."在庫区分" as inventory_type, "S00000000"."購入受入"."年度", "S00000000"."購入受入"."燃種", "S00000000"."購入受入"."受払種別", "S00000000"."購入受入"."発行番号", "S00000000"."購入受入"."店所"as shop_type, "S00000000"."購入受入"."カーゴ_bl" as cargo_bl, "S00000000"."購入受入"."受渡条件" as delivery_condition_type, "S00000000"."購入受入"."輸送船名"as ship_name, "S00000000"."購入受入"."積地"as loading_area_name, "S00000000"."購入受入"."銘柄"as brand_name, "S00000000"."購入受入"."備考" as remarks, "S00000000"."購入受入"."積完了年月日"as finish_date, "S00000000"."購入受入"."揚荷予定完了年月日" as lift_plan_date, "S00000000"."購入受入"."揚完了年月日"as lift_date, "S00000000"."購入受入"."通関年月日"as customs_clearance_date, "S00000000"."購入受入"."通関区分"as customs_clearance_type, "S00000000"."諸掛・品代"."諸掛・品代id", "S00000000"."諸掛・品代"."諸掛", "S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."承認日時", "S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."計上年月"as accounting_ym from "S00000000"."購入受入" inner join "S00000000"."諸掛・品代" on "S00000000"."諸掛・品代"."購入_年度" = "S00000000"."購入受入"."年度" and "S00000000"."諸掛・品代"."購入_発行番号" = "S00000000"."購入受入"."発行番号" and "S00000000"."諸掛・品代"."購入_受払種別" = "S00000000"."購入受入"."受払種別" and "S00000000"."諸掛・品代"."購入_燃種" = "S00000000"."購入受入"."燃種" inner join "S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額" on "S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."諸掛・品代id" = "S00000000"."諸掛・品代"."諸掛・品代id" where "S00000000"."購入受入"."燃種" ='2700' and "S00000000"."諸掛・品代"."諸掛" in ('000000','000001') and "S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."当初／精算区分" = '1' and to_date(cast("S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."承認日時" as TEXT), 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') between to_date(?,'YYYY-MM-DD') - INTERVAL '7 days' and to_date(?,'YYYY-MM-DD')) as d1
on d1."諸掛" = '000001' and "S00000000"."諸掛・品代_金額"."諸掛・品代id" = d1."諸掛・品代id" group by d1."購入受入id",d1."年度", d1."燃種", d1."受払種別", d1."発行番号", d1.inventory_type, d1.shop_type, d1.cargo_bl, d1.delivery_condition_type, d1.ship_name, d1.loading_area_name, d1.brand_name, d1.remarks, d1.finish_date, d1.lift_plan_date, d1.lift_date, d1.accounting_ym, d1.customs_clearance_date, d1.customs_clearance_type
